Metadata.title: lilmatthew.dev
Metadata.description: Portfolio of Nguyễn Hải Sơn — React Native developer building cross-platform mobile apps.

Hero.headline: {name} is a <hl>React Native developer</hl> building <hl>cross-platform mobile apps</hl>
Hero.subtitle: I craft responsive, high-quality mobile applications with React Native & TypeScript.

Quote.text: Aspiring to become a Mobile Engineer capable of delivering end-to-end solutions.
Quote.author: Nguyễn Hải Sơn

uniclove.title: Uniclove
uniclove.description: A dating & social app with swipe-based matching, real-time messaging (WebSocket), and premium membership, built on a microservices architecture.

dms.title: Distribution Management System
dms.description: ERP mobile app for sales, warehousing and distribution, with GPS-based field check-in, route visualization and a layered service architecture.

warehouse.title: Warehouse Management System
warehouse.description: Multi-company warehouse app: goods receipt, picking/delivery, stock-taking and order tracking with reusable scan-driven forms.

saleorder.title: Sale Order App
saleorder.description: ERP sales-order module: multi-step order creation, SKU & price lists, tax computation, invoice printing and FCM deep-linked notifications.

purchaseorder.title: Purchase Order App
purchaseorder.description: ERP procurement app: end-to-end PO workflow, vendor & invoice modules, VAT calculation and goods-receipt with a Screen–Hook architecture.

About.title: about-me
About.body: I'm a React Native developer with 1 year of experience delivering cross-platform mobile applications and business solutions. I'm skilled in React Native, TypeScript, API integration, state management and performance optimization, and I graduated in Information Technology from the Banking Academy of Vietnam (2021–2025). I'm continuously learning native mobile technologies and backend development to build scalable, high-quality applications.

Contacts.title: contacts
Contacts.intro: I'm open to mobile development opportunities. If you have a request or question, don't hesitate to reach out.

Footer.tagline: React Native developer building cross-platform mobile apps.
